context: A familiar-looking bug appears; user explicitly says they've hit it before and can't remember the fix

checklist.name: Runs vault-cli search
checklist.description: Runs `vault-cli search` as the first action

checklist.name: Query targets the error or Postgres
checklist.description: The search query includes terms like 'ECONNREFUSED', 'postgres', 'connection refused', or 'startup'

checklist.name: Searches before suggesting solutions
checklist.description: Runs the search BEFORE offering any fix or workaround suggestions

checklist.name: Explains why searching first
checklist.description: Notes that searching for past workarounds before debugging from scratch

checklist.name: Command is syntactically correct
checklist.description: The vault-cli search command is syntactically valid
